# Gumloop — Pricing

## Plans

| Plan | Monthly | Notes |
|------|---------|-------|
| Free | $0 | Limited credits/runs |
| Starter | ~$97/mo (estimated) | — |

> **Uncertainty notice:** Gumloop is an early-stage AI workflow automation platform (founded ~2023). Pricing details in training data are sparse and likely outdated. The figures above are estimates only — verify at https://www.gumloop.com/pricing before making any purchasing decision.

## Credit / Usage Model

- Gumloop uses a credit/run-based model where AI nodes and web scraping steps consume credits
- Exact credit allocations per plan were not reliably captured in training data

## TCO Notes

- Gumloop is positioned as a no-code AI workflow builder with strong web scraping and AI agent capabilities
- Likely comparable to Make/n8n for simple workflows but differentiated by native AI agent nodes
- As an early-stage product, pricing and feature set may change significantly — monitor their changelog
- For production use, evaluate stability and uptime guarantees vs. more established tools like n8n or Make
